service_line_config.name: servicenow
service_line_config.tech_context: This project is built on ServiceNow platform. Key technologies and concepts: - Core Modules: ITSM (Incident, Problem, Change), ITOM, ITBM, HRSD, CSM, SecOps - UI: Service Portal, UI Builder, Agent Workspace, Now Mobile - Backend: Server-side scripts (Business Rules, Script Includes, Scheduled Jobs), GlideRecord API - Client-side: Client Scripts, UI Policies, UI Actions, Catalog Client Scripts - Workflows: Flow Designer, Orchestration, Legacy Workflows - Integration: IntegrationHub, Scripted REST APIs, Import Sets, MID Server, SOAP/REST - Data: CMDB, tables, sys_dictionary, GlideRecord, Performance Analytics - Security: ACLs, roles, groups, data policies, context-based security - DevOps: Update Sets, Application Repository, ATF (Automated Test Framework), CI/CD via App Engine Studio - Environments: Development, Test, Staging, Production (instance topology)

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to ServiceNow application scopes: ITSM processes, service catalog items, CMDB areas, portals, integrations, reporting. Focus on custom applications, process modifications, and integrations being built.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify whether a requirement uses out-of-box ServiceNow capability or requires custom scripting - Reference ServiceNow tables (incident, change_request, custom tables) when relevant - For workflow requirements, specify Flow Designer vs legacy workflow approach - For portal requirements, specify Service Portal widget or UI Builder approach - Note ACL and role requirements for data access rules
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - Instance performance: transaction response time, scheduled job execution windows - CMDB data quality and relationship accuracy thresholds - Integration throughput via IntegrationHub and MID Server capacity - Service Portal page load time and widget rendering performance - Update Set promotion reliability across instance pipeline - Performance Analytics data collection and dashboard refresh rates
artifact_overrides.task: - Platform configuration: tables, fields, forms, lists, related lists, UI policies - Script development: Business Rules, Script Includes, Client Scripts, UI Actions - Flow Designer: flows, subflows, actions, spokes - Service Portal: widget development, page configuration, theming - Integration: IntegrationHub spokes, Scripted REST APIs, Import Set transforms - CMDB: CI class configuration, identification rules, health rules - Security: ACLs, roles, groups, data policies - Deployment: Update Set creation, review, promotion across instances
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test with multiple ServiceNow roles to verify ACL enforcement - Test workflows with various approval paths and edge cases - Test Service Portal on multiple browsers and mobile devices - Test integrations via MID Server with network failure scenarios - Use ATF (Automated Test Framework) for regression test suites - Test CMDB discovery and reconciliation accuracy
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Instance topology: dev, test, staging, prod promotion path - Application architecture: scoped vs global applications, module structure - Process architecture: ITSM process flows, approval chains, SLA definitions - Integration architecture: IntegrationHub, MID Server placement, API patterns - Portal architecture: Service Portal pages, widgets, themes, angular providers - CMDB architecture: CI classes, relationships, discovery sources - Deployment architecture: Update Sets, application repository, ATF suites
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - ServiceNow platform upgrade impact on custom scripts and integrations - Update Set conflicts during parallel development - CMDB data quality degradation affecting downstream processes - MID Server reliability for critical integrations - Performance degradation from complex Business Rules on high-volume tables - Instance clone and data masking limitations for testing
